consumerTone: plain English; educational growth and bone genetics context only; no growth prediction, bone-density, osteoporosis, endocrine, pediatric, imaging, lab, exercise-clearance, diagnosis, treatment, supplement, or actionability claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated growth model, height model, bone-density model, osteoporosis model, endocrine model, pediatric growth model, imaging evidence, lab evidence, supplement model, treatment context, exercise-clearance context, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived fitness-trait evidence for growth-bone-health validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable growth, height, pediatric growth-status, bone-density, osteoporosis-risk, fracture-risk, endocrine, imaging, lab, supplement, treatment, exercise-clearance, actionability, and calibrated models explicitly. Use sibling Gene-In-Form sample rows only as observed output-format examples; do not infer growth/height, pediatric growth status, bone density, osteoporosis risk, fracture risk, supplement need, treatment need, exercise clearance, or sample-only medical outcomes from genotype alone.

Gene-In-Form Personalized Fitness sibling sample report

reportPurpose: Consumer growth and bone health context using derived ACTN3 and ACE evidence plus sibling Gene-In-Form growth/bone-adjacent, connective-tissue, and musculoskeletal output-structure evidence.
